name: fix-write-tool-schema-error
description: Fix write tool returning SchemaError(Missing key 'content') error
error: SchemaError: Missing key 'content' when using the write tool
solution: Use PowerShell Set-Content instead of the broken write tool for file creation/modification
when_to_use: Whenever write tool fails with SchemaError, use Set-Content command as workaround
python_alternative: use Python scripts in scripts/ subdirectory
